title: At the Restaurant
description: Practice ordering food and dining conversations

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Good evening. Welcome to our restaurant. Table for how many?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Table for two, please.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Right this way. Here are your menus.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Thank you. What do you recommend?

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Our grilled salmon is very popular today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I'll have the salmon, please. And a glass of water.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Excellent choice. I'll be right back with your drink.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Excuse me, could we have the bill, please?

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Of course. Here you are.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can I pay by card?

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Yes, we accept all major cards.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Great. The food was delicious, thank you.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Thank you! We hope to see you again.

lines.speaker: Host
lines.text: Thank you for calling La Trattoria. How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Caller
lines.text: Hi, I'd like to make a reservation for this Saturday evening, please.

lines.speaker: Host
lines.text: Of course. How many guests will there be?

lines.speaker: Caller
lines.text: Six people. It's a birthday celebration, actually.

lines.speaker: Host
lines.text: How lovely! What time would you prefer? We have availability at 6:30, 7:00, and 8:30.

lines.speaker: Caller
lines.text: 7:00 would be perfect. Could we have a table near the window if possible?

lines.speaker: Host
lines.text: I'll make a note of your preference. Window tables are first come, first served, but we'll do our best. Can I have a name for the reservation?

lines.speaker: Caller
lines.text: It's under Rodriguez. R-O-D-R-I-G-U-E-Z.

lines.speaker: Host
lines.text: Perfect, Mr. Rodriguez. Would you like us to prepare anything special for the birthday? We offer a complimentary dessert with a candle.

lines.speaker: Caller
lines.text: That would be wonderful! Also, one of our guests has a nut allergy. Can the kitchen accommodate that?

lines.speaker: Host
lines.text: Absolutely. I'll flag it in the reservation so the chef is aware. We take allergies very seriously.

lines.speaker: Caller
lines.text: That's reassuring. Thank you so much.

lines.speaker: Host
lines.text: You're welcome. We look forward to seeing you Saturday at 7:00. Please call us if anything changes.

lines.speaker: Server
lines.text: Good evening. Are you ready to order, or would you like a few more minutes?

lines.speaker: Diner
lines.text: I have a couple of questions first. I'm vegan, so I was wondering which dishes on the menu are plant-based.

lines.speaker: Server
lines.text: Of course. We have several vegan options. The mushroom risotto, the roasted vegetable pasta, and our Thai coconut curry are all fully plant-based.

lines.speaker: Diner
lines.text: The Thai coconut curry sounds interesting. Does it contain any soy? I'm also soy-intolerant.

lines.speaker: Server
lines.text: Let me check with the kitchen. One moment, please.

lines.speaker: Server
lines.text: The chef confirms the curry is soy-free. It uses coconut aminos instead of soy sauce.

lines.speaker: Diner
lines.text: Perfect. I'll have the coconut curry, then. Is the bread vegan as well?

lines.speaker: Server
lines.text: Our sourdough is vegan, but the garlic bread contains butter. I can ask the kitchen to make it with olive oil instead.

lines.speaker: Diner
lines.text: That would be great. And for dessert, do you have any vegan options?

lines.speaker: Server
lines.text: We have a dark chocolate avocado mousse and a coconut milk panna cotta. Both are dairy-free and egg-free.

lines.speaker: Diner
lines.text: I'll decide on dessert later. Thank you for being so helpful with the dietary questions.

lines.speaker: Server
lines.text: It's my pleasure. We want everyone to enjoy their meal comfortably.

dialogues.title: Handling a Problem with the Order

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Excuse me, could I speak to the manager, please?

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.text: I'm the manager. Is everything all right?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I'm afraid not. I ordered my steak medium-rare, but it arrived well-done. And we've been waiting over an hour for our food.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.text: I sincerely apologize for both issues. That's not the experience we want our guests to have. Let me take care of this right away.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I appreciate that. My partner's pasta was fine, but my dish really isn't what I ordered.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.text: I'll have the kitchen prepare a new steak for you immediately — medium-rare as you requested. It should be ready in about ten minutes.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Thank you. We also noticed we were charged for a bottle of wine we didn't order.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.text: Let me check that. You're absolutely right — that's a billing error. I'll correct it immediately. As an apology for the wait and the steak, I'd like to offer your desserts on the house tonight.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: That's very generous. We appreciate you handling this so well.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.text: It's the least I can do. Your new steak is being prepared by our head chef personally. Is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: No, I think that covers everything. Thank you for listening.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.text: Thank you for letting us know. We always want a chance to make things right.
